name: OpenAI
description: Builds frontier AI models and products such as ChatGPT, GPT models, Codex, and Sora.

name: Anthropic
description: Develops Claude models with a focus on helpful, reliable, and safer AI systems.

name: Google DeepMind
description: Researches and builds advanced AI systems including Gemini, AlphaFold, Veo, and robotics work.

name: xAI
description: Builds Grok and AI systems connected to real-time consumer and developer products.

name: Meta AI
description: Creates AI research, open models such as Llama, and AI experiences across Meta products.

name: Hugging Face
description: Hosts open-source models, datasets, Spaces, and tools for the machine learning community.

name: Mistral AI
description: Builds efficient open and commercial AI models for developers and enterprises.

name: Cohere
description: Focuses on enterprise language models, retrieval, search, and private AI deployments.

name: Perplexity
description: Builds AI answer engines for research, search, citations, and knowledge discovery.
